title: Veronica brachysiphon
taxonomy: Veronica brachysiphon is classified within the family Plantaginaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the plantain or snakeroot family. This family is a part of the order Lamiales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Veronica brachysiphon is further classified as a member of the genus Veronica, which comprises a variety of flowering plants commonly known as speedwells. The genus Veronica is divided into several subgenera and species, with Veronica brachysiphon being one of the lesser-known species. Veronica brachysiphon is native to China and is a rare and endemic species.
